_doc: RK3588 CPU spec (Phase 1.2). big.LITTLE: 4x A76 + 4x A55, NEON 128-bit. CALIBRATION BASIS = single A76 core, single-thread, numpy fp32 (cpu_ops.json); multi-core/A55 are EXTRAPOLATED (simulated). Cache BW = ARM A76 TRM estimate (assumption) and is SELF-CONTAINED here: WP-CPU depends ONLY on this spec, NOT on the memory spec (WP-MEM). These cache tiers are the A76's own SRAM, NOT the Metis AIPU SRAM tier and NOT the production-card LPDDR4x.

notes.decode_residency: decode support-op working sets reside in L1/L2/L3 -> memory term uses CACHE BW, never host LPDDR. 'swap LPDDR4->5 recompute' applies to PREFILL only.
notes.cost_driver: exp() transcendental (softmax/swiglu) dominates, NOT a reduction/elementwise split.
notes.fp16: numpy-emulated on A76 -> UPPER BOUND; swiglu fp16 = mixed precision.
notes.multicore: single-core measured -> multi-core extrapolated; A55 IPC=1 (single NEON pipe); A55+multicore unmeasured = simulated.
notes.cache_vs_metis: cache_bw_GBs is the A76's own SRAM (TRM estimate), NOT the Metis AIPU SRAM tier (sram_metis_aipu) and NOT the production-card LPDDR4x (24.2).

provenance.cache_bw_GBs: ARM A76 TRM estimate (2x128-bit load L1; derived L2/L3; host LPDDR4x peak) [assumption]
provenance.calibration_basis: Phase 0.3 protocol: single A76 core, single-thread, numpy fp32 [measured]
